OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector (ISO 8601 duration format).

PROOFPOINT_ET_REPUTATION_API_TOKEN.description: API token used for authentication with the ProofPoint ET Reputation API.

PROOFPOINT_ET_REPUTATION_CREATE_INDICATO.description: Whether to create indicators from the reputation data. If true, indicators and relationships will be generated; otherwise, only observables will be created.

PROOFPOINT_ET_REPUTATION_MIN_SCORE.description: Minimum score threshold for processing reputation data. Must be between 20 and 100.
